_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: The effects of CQ and HCQ were confirmed by them inducing numerous intracellular vesicles due to lysosomal swelling, compared with the findings in the vehicle control
details: 50 μM CQ induced numerous intracellular vesicles due to lysosomal swelling
